name: Task 1: Estate Planning AI Intake Triage

parameters.formDescription: Manual mode: fill the client fields below. Batch mode: select File Format and upload a CSV, JSON, or XLSX file. Leave file fields empty for manual entry.

parameters.completionMessage:
={{ $('Format Final Outputs').first().json.sample_output.map(c => `

${c.client_name}

Urgency:${c.urgency_flag}

Recommended Instruments

    ${c.recommended_instruments.map((inst,idx)=>`
  1. #${idx+1}${inst}
    2. `).join('')}

Rationale

${c.rationale}

`).join('') }}
